headings.usage: Use for all headings (h1-h6), big stats, and navigation items.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, table data, and inputs.

accent.name: Electric Indigo
accent.usage: Interactive links, focus rings, progress bars

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium text-sm

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 h-10 rounded-md

locked_state.container: relative overflow-hidden opacity-75 grayscale-[0.5] pointer-events-none select-none
locked_state.overlay: absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md z-10 pointer-events-auto
locked_state.cta: bg-white shadow-sm border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-xs hover:scale-105 transition-transform cursor-pointer

layouts.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto
layouts.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 flex flex-col border-r border-slate-800 z-50

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html immediately.
Sidebar Implementation: Create a persistent Layout component that includes the Sidebar. Do not repeat Sidebar code in every page.
Locked Services: Render ALL services in the sidebar, but add a 'lock' icon to inactive ones. Clicking them should show the Upsell Modal, not a 403 error.
Video Module: Use a large video player placeholder (aspect-video) with the 'video_studio' image as poster.
Admin vs Client: Use the same layout structure but different sidebar items. Admin gets 'Users' and 'Settings'.
Login Page: Split screen. Left side form, Right side 'agency_office' image with an overlay.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Avoid centering text in the dashboard. Use left alignment for readability.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
